sentences.arabic: كَانَتِ الْجَدَّةُ تَحْكِي لَنَا قِصَصًا رَائِعَةً قَبْلَ النَّوْمِ.
sentences.translation: Nena nam je pričala predivne priče prije spavanja.
sentences.translationEn: Grandmother used to tell us wonderful stories before bed.

sentences.arabic: كُلُّ قِصَّةٍ تَبْدَأُ بِجُمْلَةِ "كَانَ يَا مَا كَانَ".
sentences.translation: Svaka priča počinje rečenicom "Bio jednom jedan".
sentences.translationEn: Every story starts with the phrase "Once upon a time."

sentences.arabic: نَحْنُ نَسْتَمِعُ إِلَيْهَا بِاهْتِمَامٍ كَبِيرٍ لِأَنَّهَا تُعَلِّمُنَا دُرُوسًا فِي الْحَيَاةِ.
sentences.translation: Slušamo je s velikim interesovanjem jer nas uči životnim lekcijama.
sentences.translationEn: We listen to her with great interest because she teaches us life lessons.

sentences.arabic: فِي النِّهَايَةِ، يَنْتَصِرُ الْخَيْرُ دَائِمًا عَلَى الشَّرِّ.
sentences.translation: Na kraju, dobro uvijek pobjeđuje zlo.
sentences.translationEn: In the end, good always triumphs over evil.

sentences.translation: Priče čine našu maštu bogatom i korisnom.
sentences.translationEn: Stories make our imagination broad and useful.
